event_description: I have no reliable knowledge of Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (IOVA) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance determination, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Iovance has had CFO transitions over the years, but I do not recall any of these being publicly tied to accounting irregularities or financial-reporting problems. My training data does not indicate any such event occurred for this company.
